channel.title: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament
channel.description: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament

item.title: Opinion Poll by Promocija plus for RTL, 1–3 June 2026 – Seating Plan Projection
item.description:
Seating plan projection for the European Parliament
7 seats needed for a majority
Opinion poll by Promocija plus for RTL, 1–3 June 2026
Details on https://filipvanlaenen.github.io/croation_ep_polls/2026-06-03-Promocijaplus.html
